rows.label: qev050903_MSG0001
rows.name:
I have been waiting.
I trust you have gathered the materials.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0002
rows.name:
I have received them.
With this, we can resume the repair work
on the abandoned Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0003
rows.name: I will have the work started immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0004
rows.name: The repairs on the Doll are complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0005
rows.name:
Thanks to you, a unit that was on the verge of being scrapped
has been revived.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0006
rows.name:
Umm, Platoon Commander.
Why was I summoned here...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0007
rows.name:
They gathered the materials for your sake.
I believe it is only right to express your gratitude to your ally.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0008
rows.name: I-I see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0009
rows.name:
I am deeply indebted to you for everything this time.
I thank you from the bottom of my heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0010
rows.name:
.........Thank you.
Truly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0011
rows.name:
Now then...
This proves the bond of trust between you
and your ally.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0012
rows.name:
...So.
About your reassignment request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0013
rows.name: Platoon Commander, regarding that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0014
rows.name:
Perhaps, as you suggested, Platoon Commander,
I may have requested this reassignment simply to distance myself
from the front lines, where I could not fit in with my compatriots...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0015
rows.name:
I was terrified of interacting with others to accomplish things...
Which is why... I resorted to the extremely passive measure
of asking for a reassignment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0016
rows.name:
Your words are unclear!
Gu Ladha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0017
rows.name: Y... yes! Umm, what I mean is...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0018
rows.name: Enough! I have no desire to hear your excuses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0019
rows.name: Ugh... You are as unsparing as ever...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0020
rows.name:
Gu Ladha!
I am entrusting you with the Doll
whose repairs have just been completed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0021
rows.name: Eh...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0022
rows.name:
Even as a liaison, it remains a dangerous mission.
There is absolutely no issue with assigning
one Doll to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0023
rows.name: Eh...? Umm... Then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0024
rows.name:
...This Earthling here worked on your behalf.
This bond of trust is your true asset, and your talent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0025
rows.name:
The task I requested of this BLADE
from the very beginning...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0026
rows.name:
Was to gauge just how much importance this person,
whom you call an ally, places on their bond of trust with you.
...That is what it was all for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0027
rows.name:
As a result...
I have judged that the mission of liaison with the Earthlings
is perfectly suited for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0028
rows.name: Platoon Commander...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0029
rows.name:
That is all!
Continue to dedicate yourself to your duties, Gu Ladha!
And do not forget your trust and gratitude toward your ally![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0030
rows.name:
Y... Yes, sir!
Thank you very much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0031
rows.name:
I...
I will fulfill my duties with the utmost sincerity...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0032
rows.name:
Earthling...
Let us continue to work together as allies!
Please... I look forward to our continued partnership![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0033
rows.name:
Gathering materials such as a Bloodied Face,
Reinforced Blade Parts, and Next-Gen Main Core Parts...
I must admit, I came up with a rather materialistic request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0034
rows.name:
I apologize for dragging you into this, but...
Could I ask you to act on Gu Ladha's behalf
just a little longer?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0035
rows.name:
Perhaps she has been waiting to meet an ally
like you all this while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050903_MSG0036
rows.name: Someone... who can give her the push she needs.[ST:wait ]
